step_rationale: Plant sterol biomarker for CAD/MI risk; reflects lipid metabolism and retention pathway.
mechanism: Campesterol, a plant sterol, is elevated in CAD/MI and reflects altered lipid metabolism and atherogenic lipid retention.

references.title: Genotype-based "virtual" metabolomics in a clinical biobank identifies novel metabolite-disease associations.
Genotype-based "virtual" metabolomics in a clinical biobank identifies novel metabolite-disease associations.
